headline: Can Huntington Turn Growth Momentum Into 30% EPS Expansion by 2027?
summary: HBAN targets an adjusted EPS of $1.90-$1.93 by 2027. Can revenue growth, fee-income gains and merger synergies drive more than 30% growth?

raw.headline: Can Huntington Turn Growth Momentum Into 30% EPS Expansion by 2027?

headline: American Banker Names Regions Bank’s Bryan Ford Among Most Innovative People in Finance
summary: BIRMINGHAM, Ala., June 02, 2026--Regions Bank on Tuesday announced Bryan Ford, head of Regions Treasury Management, has been named one of American Banker’s Most Innovative People in Finance.

headline: Regions Financial Expands Homeownership Support And Deepens Retail Banking Ties
summary: Regions Financial (NYSE:RF) is marking National Homeownership Month with enhanced homeownership resources. The company is rolling out free educational webinars and tailored mortgage guidance for first-time buyers and local communities. The initiative focuses on financial education and support beyond traditional banking services. Regions Financial, trading at $27.34, is putting extra attention on housing access and education at a time when many buyers are facing affordability questions. The...
